steps.title: Calculate the mean
steps.content: For a mean question with a raw list, the fastest Desmos method is to enter the whole list and use `mean`. The ten values sum to $100$, and there are $10$ values, so the mean is $100/10=10$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Desmos returns $\operatorname{mean}(l_1)=10$, so the answer is 10.
